name: Honey Potter Courts TX
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's actually an airport. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: The Dalhart Junior High School
description: The Dalhart Junior High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dalhart, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: The ROC
description: The ROC is a place to play pickleball in Dalhart, TX. There are 4 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball play is open to anyone on Wednesday and Sunday evenings.
